title: New Zealand men's national under-18 ice hockey team
summary: The New Zealand men's national under-18 ice hockey team is the men's national under-18 ice hockey team of New Zealand. The team is controlled by the New Zealand Ice Hockey Federation, a member of the International Ice Hockey Federation. The team represents New Zealand at the IIHF World U18 Championships.
text:
The New Zealand men's national under-18 ice hockey team is the men's national under-18 ice hockey team of New Zealand. The team is controlled by the New Zealand Ice Hockey Federation, a member of the International Ice Hockey Federation. The team represents New Zealand at the IIHF World U18 Championships.

International competitions
IIHF Asian Oceanic U18 Championships
1998: 5th place
1999: 3rd in Division II
2000: 1st in Division II
2001: 4th place
2002:  3rd place

IIHF World U18 Championships
